text: Find all Tibetan commentaries in the Sources folder written by authors like Ngulchu Thogme or Khenpo Kunpal
Create a summary of the 1-SOURCES-Guideline to help me properly format and tag new Tibetan source files
Research the historical relationship between the Sanskrit root text and the Tibetan translation of the Bodhicharyavatara
Process the draft commentary in the Inbox using the format-commentary skill and move it to the Transformations folder
